overall.description: A first-person exploration of a futuristic luxury apartment interior from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring dark polished walkways, neon red and cyan lighting, and a dramatic central atrium with a towering red-lit elevator shaft. The camera moves through curved corridors, looks up the multi-story atrium, and ends in a lounge area with white modular furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved luxury apartment walkway with level 3-4 markers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved walkway with planters and modern benches

entered.detail: illuminated number 3 on the wall indicating floor level
transparent safety barrier along the walkway edge
long black planter box with green ferns
glowing advertisement screen at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a curved walkway in a futuristic luxury apartment building. Dark polished marble floors reflect the ambient lighting. Level markers '3' and '4' are visible on the walls, and rectangular planters with greenery line the path. The camera moves forward along the corridor toward a digital screen visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: central atrium with towering red-lit elevator shaft

events.description: turning left at the corridor end reveals the vast central atrium with a towering structure
camera tilts upward to look up the height of the red-lit elevator shaft

agents.ego_description: turning to face the atrium and looking upward at the towering illuminated structure

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure with intense red neon lighting running vertically
horizontal cyan light strip along the upper wall
balcony level visible across the atrium
bright white lights at the top of the atrium

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at the corridor end, revealing a dramatic multi-story atrium dominated by a towering glass elevator shaft bathed in red neon light. The camera tilts upward to follow the structure's height, showing cyan light strips on the walls and spotlights at the top. Level marker '5' becomes visible on the left as the perspective shifts to emphasize the vertical scale.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level walkways overlooking the atrium depth

events.description: camera looks down from the upper level to view the atrium floors below
approaching the lounge area with white furniture visible ahead

agents.ego_description: moving along upper walkways while looking down into the atrium depths

entered.detail: illuminated number 9 on the wall indicating the current floor
illuminated number 10 on a structural pillar
multiple floors visible below with glass railings and red lighting

segments.scene_description: From the upper level near floors 9 and 10, the camera looks down into the atrium's depths, revealing multiple lower walkways illuminated by red accent lighting. The glass elevator shaft remains visible but now from a higher vantage point. The camera continues moving forward along the walkway, approaching a lounge area with distinctive white furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury lounge area with white modular seating

events.description: entering the lounge area with white sofas and neon decorative elements

agents.ego_description: walking through the lounge area with white couches and red neon decorative sculptures

entered.detail: decorative tree-like structure with glowing red branches
rectangular dark marble table between sofas

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a sophisticated lounge furnished with white modular sofas and distinctive red neon branch sculptures. A black marble coffee table sits between the seating. The camera moves past the furniture, with the glass elevator shaft visible again in the distance, and continues along the upper walkway as red neon beams illuminate the dark architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic luxury apartment, transitioning from a narrow, polished corridor into a vast, vertically oriented atrium and finally into a sophisticated lounge. It begins by gliding along a curved walkway of dark marble and greenery, moving past level markers toward a distant digital screen. As the camera turns left, the space opens into a dramatic multi-story atrium where the perspective tilts upward to trace a towering glass elevator shaft bathed in red neon and cyan light strips. The scene then shifts to a higher vantage point near the top floors, looking down into the depths of the atrium before moving forward along an upper walkway. Finally, the camera enters a lounge area featuring white modular sofas and red neon branch sculptures, continuing past a black marble coffee table as the red-lit architecture recedes into the distance.
